Hibernate: drop table if exists appointment_slots cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists appointments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists billing cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists departments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists doctors cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists patients cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists prescriptions cascade Hibernate: create table appointment_slots (end_time time(6) not null, slot_date date not null, start_time time(6) not null, version integer, doctor_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table appointments (appointment_date date not null, end_time time(6) not null, start_time time(6) not null, version integer, checked_in_at timestamp(6), completed_at timestamp(6), created_at timestamp(6), started_at timestamp(6), department_id uuid not null, doctor_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, patient_id uuid not null, notes varchar(255), qr_code varchar(255), reason varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table billing (discount numeric(38,2), insurance_adj numeric(38,2), subtotal numeric(38,2) not null, tax numeric(38,2), total_due numeric(38,2) not null, version integer, created_at timestamp(6), paid_at timestamp(6), appointment_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, patient_id uuid not null, payment_method varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, line_items json not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table departments (id uuid not null, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table doctors (consultation_fee numeric(38,2) not null, experience_years integer, version integer, created_at timestamp(6), department_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid, email varchar(255), first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), license_number varchar(255) not null unique, qualification varchar(255), specialty varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table patients (date_of_birth date not null, version integer, created_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, user_id uuid, blood_group varchar(255), contact_number varchar(255), email varchar(255), first_name varchar(255), gender varchar(255) not null, last_name varchar(255), mrn varchar(255) not null unique, allergies json, emergency_contact json, insurance json, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table prescriptions (version integer, created_at timestamp(6), appointment_id uuid not null, doctor_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, patient_id uuid not null, interaction_status varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, version_chain varchar(255), diagnosis json, medications json, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists appointment_slots add constraint FKndehqtdq1a94ja5ej6xs482kd foreign key (doctor_id) references doctors Hibernate: alter table if exists appointments add constraint FK7s6sk12lb7298bm0j92j4cdgg foreign key (department_id) references departments Hibernate: alter table if exists appointments add constraint FKmujeo4tymoo98cmf7uj3vsv76 foreign key (doctor_id) references doctors Hibernate: alter table if exists appointments add constraint FK8exap5wmg8kmb1g1rx3by21yt foreign key (patient_id) references FK15os5xwj7asqxdkkpgo5dowby foreign key (patient_id) references patients Hibernate: alter table if exists doctors add constraint FKl2mro81neln9topymd898urh1 foreign key (department_id) references
